prediction_reason.历年位次与招生计划: 2021–2025 年物理类最低位次依次约为 17185→18754→19328→18084→19378，整体呈后移趋势，近 5 年累计后移约 2200 名；2025 年基准约 19378 名，较 2024 年（18084）后移约 1300 名，波动幅度较大；该校在湖北省物理类招生计划 2021–2023 年均为 51 人，2024 年增至 65 人，2025 年 67 人；2026 年计划大幅扩招至 86 人，较 2025 年增加 19 人（+28.4%），扩招幅度显著，对竞争格局产生重要影响。
prediction_reason.学校层次与声誉: 中国地质大学（北京）为 211 工程、双一流建设高校；软科中国大学主榜排名约第 75 名（2026 年），近年排名稳定在 70–75 名区间，属于中上水平 211 院校；该校近年声誉平稳，未出现明显负面舆情或投档异常事件；抖音平台关注度一般，未进入热度排名前列，报考关注度相对平稳；该校以 地质学、地质资源与地质工程为传统优势，相关学科在国内处于领先地位；招生专业涵盖地质学类、地质类（能源）、地质工程、地球物理学、勘查技术与工程等，与学校特色高 度契合。
prediction_reason.专业热度与地域: 计算机科学与技术、人工智能、软件工程、电子信息等专业社会热度持续偏高，该校相关专业招生计划有所增加；地质类、材料类等专业社会热 度一般；湖北省 2026 年高考总报名人数约 39.37 万人，较 2025 年（约 39.12 万）略有增加，物理类考生估算约 25.14 万人，竞争略有加剧；该校位于北京市，对湖北省考生具有较强地域吸引力；该校在湖北省招生计划占比较大，2025 年物理类计划 67 人，2026 年扩至 86 人，为该校在鄂主要生源省份之一。
prediction_reason.预测结论: 综合历年位次整体后移趋势、2026 年大幅扩招（+28.4%）导致竞争压力分散、湖北省考生总数略有增加以及学校声誉平稳等因素；预测 2026 年物理类最低位次约 22625 名，区间 22125–23125 名。

历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plans
历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2021 to 2025, the minimum rankings for Physics Category were approximately 17185→18754→19328→18084→19378, showing an overall backward trend, with a cumulative shift of about 2200 positions over the past 5 years; the 2025 baseline is about 19378, a backward shift of about 1300 positions compared to 2024 (18084), with significant fluctuation; the university's enrollment plan for Physics Category in Hubei Province was 51 students from 2021 to 2023, increased to 65 in 2024, and 67 in 2025; the 2026 plan significantly expands to 86 students, an increase of 19 students (+28.4%) compared to 2025, with a notable expansion rate that has an important impact on the competitive landscape.

学校层次与声誉.title: University Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: China University of Geosciences (Beijing) is a 211 Project and Double First-Class construction university; its Soft Science China University main ranking is about 75th (2026), with recent rankings stable in the 70–75 range, belonging to the upper-middle level of 211 institutions; the university's reputation has been stable in recent years, with no obvious negative public opinion or abnormal admission incidents; its attention on Douyin platform is average, not ranking among the top in popularity, with relatively stable application attention; the university's traditional strengths are Geology and Geological Resources and Geological Engineering, with related disciplines leading domestically; enrollment majors include Geology, Geological Resources and Geological Engineering, Geological Engineering, Geophysics, Exploration Technology and Engineering, etc., highly aligned with the university's characteristics.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: Majors such as Computer Science and Technology, Artificial Intelligence, Software Engineering, and Electronic Information have consistently high social popularity, and the university's enrollment plans for related majors have increased; majors like Geology and Materials have average social popularity; the total number of Gaokao examinees in Hubei Province in 2026 is about 393,700, a slight increase from 2025 (about 391,200), with Physics Category examinees estimated at about 251,400, leading to slightly intensified competition; the university is located in Beijing, which has strong regional appeal to Hubei examinees; the university's enrollment plan in Hubei Province accounts for a large proportion, with 67 Physics Category students in 2025 and expanding to 86 in 2026, making it one of the main source provinces for the university.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Considering the overall backward trend of historical rankings, the significant expansion in 2026 (+28.4%) leading to dispersed competitive pressure, a slight increase in the total number of examinees in Hubei Province, and the stable reputation of the university; it is predicted that the minimum ranking for Physics Category in 2026 will be about 22625, with a range of 22125–23125.

major_tier_recommendation_en.overall_advice: If your ranking is within the predicted range of 22125–23125, it is recommended to focus on Tier 2 majors as the main choice, with Tier 1 majors as a reach (popular majors like Computer Science and Artificial Intelligence require higher rankings), and Tier 3 majors as a safety net; if your ranking is significantly better than the lower limit of the range (e.g., within 22000), you can focus on reaching for Tier 1 flagship majors; if your ranking is close to the upper limit of the range (e.g., above 23000), you should mainly rely on Tier 3 majors as a safety net.

历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plan
历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2021 to 2025, the minimum rankings for History Category were approximately 2650→3247→3658→4012→4222, showing a continuous backward trend, with a cumulative backward shift of about 1570 places over the past 5 years; the 2025 baseline is about 4222, a backward shift of about 210 places compared to 2024 (4012), with a slowing pace; the university's enrollment plan for History Category in Hubei was 3 students from 2021 to 2023, increased to 5 in 2024, and to 7 in 2025; the 2026 plan slightly reduces to 6 students, a decrease of 1 student (-14.3%) compared to 2025, with a limited reduction.

学校层次与声誉.title: University Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: China University of Geosciences (Beijing) is a 211 Project and Double First-Class construction university; it ranks approximately 75th in the Soft Science Chinese University Main Ranking (2026), belonging to the upper-middle level of 211 institutions, with brand appeal to liberal arts candidates; its reputation has been stable in recent years, with no significant negative public opinion or abnormal admission incidents; its Douyin platform attention is moderate, and application attention is relatively stable; the university's traditional strengths are geology, geological resources, and geological engineering, but the History Category has few majors (Natural Resources Registration and Management, Accounting, English, Translation), with low relevance to the university's engineering characteristics.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: Accounting has a social popularity of recommended/differentiated wait-and-see, with clear advantages for civil service exams; English, Translation, and other foreign language majors have a general wait-and-see social popularity; the total number of Hubei Gaokao registrants in 2026 is approximately 393,700, with History Category candidates estimated at about 142,300, a slight increase from 2025 (about 141,400); the university is located in Beijing, which has strong regional appeal to liberal arts candidates in Hubei; the History Category enrollment plan is small (6 students), leading to relatively concentrated competition.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Considering the continuous backward trend of historical rankings, the slight enrollment reduction in 2026 (-14.3%) leading to slightly intensified competition, a slight increase in the total number of candidates in Hubei, and stable university reputation; it is predicted that the minimum ranking for History Category in 2026 will be about 3840, with a range of 3340–4340.
